title: IIM Lucknow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Associate, Senior Research Assistant and More Posts
organization: Indian Institute of Management Lucknow (IIM Lucknow)
post_name: Senior Research Associate/ Research Associate ‘A’/ Research Associate ‘B’ / Senior Research Assistant
short_info: Indian Institute of Management Lucknow (IIM Lucknow) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Senior Research Associate/ Research Associate ‘A’/ Research Associate ‘B’ / Senior Research Assistant Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D in a relevant field with minimum years of research experience, Post Graduate from a reputed institute/ university in regular mode with minimum 60% marks, At least one research paper in any category of a journal, Post Graduate/MBA from a reputed institute/ university in regular mode with minimum 60% marks
qualification.details: Senior Research / Academic Associate: Ph.D in a relevant field with a minimum of 3 years of research experience; Post Graduate from a reputed institute/ university in regular mode with minimum 60% marks; At least one research paper in any category of a journal. Research / Academic Associate ‘A’: Ph.D in a relevant field with a minimum of 2 years of research experience; Post Graduate from a reputed institute/ university in regular mode with minimum 60% marks; At least one research paper in any category of a journal. Research/Academic Associate ‘B’: Ph.D in a relevant field; Post Graduate from a reputed institute/ university in regular mode with minimum 60% marks; At least one research paper in any category of a journal. Senior Research/Academic Assistant: Post Graduate/MBA from a reputed institute/ university in regular mode with minimum 60% marks.

salary_details.senior research / academic associate: ₹ 70,000 + HRA as per norms on emoluments
salary_details.research / academic associate ‘a’: ₹ 65,000 + HRA as per norms on emoluments
salary_details.research/academic associate ‘b’: ₹ 60,000 + HRA as per norms on emoluments
salary_details.senior research/academic assistant: ₹ 50,000 + HRA as per norms on emoluments

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Lucknow recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for the submission of applications for the IIM Lucknow recruitment is 30th May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this IIM Lucknow recruitment?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Senior Research Associate/ Research Associate ‘A’/ Research Associate ‘B’ / Senior Research Assistant in this recruitment drive by IIM Lucknow.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this IIM Lucknow recruitment is via email. Candidates need to send their applications along with required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Research / Academic Associate post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Senior Research / Academic Associate post is ₹ 70,000 per month, plus HRA as per norms on emoluments.

faq.question: Q5. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Senior Research/Academic Assistant post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the Senior Research/Academic Assistant post is a Post Graduate/MBA from a reputed institute/university in regular mode with a minimum of 60% marks.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for this recruitment. Both General/OBC and SC/ST category candidates are exempted from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will be based on an Interview. Candidates who are shortlisted will be called for an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Does IIM Lucknow offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any age limits or relaxation details. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for any such information.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for IIM Lucknow recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' description. It is recommended to download and read it thoroughly.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be attached with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of all required documents, including educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs, along with their application.
